'''Deran Nalual''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Togruta/Legends|Togruta]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. A [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], she survived the war and the execution of [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], along with her master, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Siadem Forte]], though she was blinded during their escape.

==Biography==
Deran Nalual, a [[Togruta/Legends|Togruta]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], was [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Siadem Forte]]'s [[Padawan/Legends|Jedi apprentice]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the Republic's [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] issued [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], which branded the Jedi as enemies of the Republic. When her clone troopers turned their [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] on the Jedi pair, Forte and Nalual fought and killed their troops before issuing a [[Emergency Code Nine Thirteen/Legends|distress call]] from [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]]. Blind from the attack by her troops, Nalual felt some comfort when eight other Jedi arrived on planet. Forte led the fugitive Jedi in hijacking an [[SX troop transport|SX troop shuttle]] from the newly formed [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], making their way offworld. While they were pursued by a group of [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170s]] and a light cruiser, losing four of their company, Nalual and the others escaped pursuit and were given sanctuary by the crew of the ''[[Drunk Dancer]]''. In the company of [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Jula Shryne]], the group was eventually joined by Master [[Roan Shryne]] and Padawan [[Olee Starstone]]. Given knew hope by Starstone's enthusiasm and determination, Nalual and her companions agreed to search for [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="DL" />

Once there, Kashyyyk came under [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|invasion]] by the Empire for housing Jedi. Led by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], the Empire searched for the Jedi fugitives, eventually confronting them. Padawan Nalual remained on watch at the landing pad in [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]], while her master and the others went into the city to discuss strategy with the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] chieftains. While her master died in a confrontation with Vader, Nalual dutifully waited for her companions before they took off and fled into space. With her friends support, Nalual decided to work on construction sites, or in an agricultural projects within the Empire, and intended to undo the Sith in more subtle ways than with a lightsaber.<ref name="DL" />
